## LibraryRuntime.ProducedMoldedBonBon.setShellChocolate() method

Sets the shell chocolate. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setShellChocolate(chocolateId: IngredientId): Result<void>;
```
